index.js:

const navToggle = document.querySelector(".nav-toggle");
const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".nav__link");

const slider = document.querySelector(".projects__container");

navToggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
  document.body.classList.toggle("nav-open");
});

navLinks.forEach((link) => {
  link.addEventListener("click", () => {
    document.body.classList.remove("nav-open");
  });
});

if (slider) {
  // Horizontal Scroll Logic

  slider.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
    const rect = slider.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const width = rect.width;

    const scrollAmount = 650;

    const leftZone = width * 0.25;
    const rightZone = width * 0.75;

    if (x < leftZone) {
      slider.scrollBy({ left: -scrollAmount, behavior: "smooth" });
    } else if (x > rightZone) {
      slider.scrollBy({ left: scrollAmount, behavior: "smooth" });
    }
  });

  slider.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => {
    const rect = slider.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const width = rect.width;

    if (x < width * 0.25) {
      slider.style.cursor = "pointer"; // Left arrow
    } else if (x > width * 0.75) {
      slider.style.cursor = "pointer"; // Right arrow
    } else {
      slider.style.cursor = "default";
    }
  });
}

// Set current year in footer
const yearSpan = document.getElementById("copyright-year");
if (yearSpan) {
  yearSpan.textContent = new Date().getFullYear();
}

                    <li class="nav__item">
                        <a href="#work" class="nav__link" tabindex="-1">My Work</a>
                        <span class="nav__link--index">6</span>
                    </li>
                    <li class="nav__item">
                        <a href="#contact" class="nav__link" tabindex="-1">Contact Me</a>
                        <span class="nav__link--index">7</span>
                    </li>
                </ul>
            </nav>
        </header>

        <!-- Introduction -->
         <section class="intro" id="home">
            <h1 class="section__title section__title--intro">
                Hey, I'm <strong>Dario Hunt</strong>
            </h1>
            <p class="section__subtitle section__subtitle--intro">Full-stack digital problem solver</p>
            <img src="imgs/headshot1.webp" alt="a picture of Dario Hunt" class="intro__img">
         </section>

        <!-- My services -->
         <section class="my-services" id="services">
            <h2 class="section__title section__title--services">What I Do</h2>
            <div class="services">
                <div class="service">
                    <h3>Branding + Design</h3>
                    <p>
                       I create cohesive visual systems that capture who you are and make people <em>feel</em> something. From brand identities and creative direction to campaigns and visuals, everything is built to be consistent, flexible, and timeless. 
                    </p>
                </div> <!-- / service -->

                <div class="service">
                    <h3>Web Development</h3>
                    <p>
                        I build fast, functional websites that connect design with performance. Whether it’s a custom portfolio, eCommerce store, or digital experience, my goal is to make it look good <em>and</em> work even better.
                    </p>
                </div> <!-- / service -->

                <div class="service">
                    <h3>Marketing + SEO</h3>
                    <p>
                        I develop strategies that help brands stand out online — from search optimization and keyword strategy to content systems and marketing funnels that actually <em>convert</em>. I'm all about creating structure and storytelling that resonates with audiences.
                    </p>
                </div> <!-- / service -->
            </div> <!-- / services -->

            <a href="#work" class="btn">My Work</a>
         </section>

        <!-- About me -->

index.js:

const navToggle = document.querySelector(".nav-toggle");
const navLinks = document.querySelectorAll(".nav__link");

const slider = document.querySelector(".projects__container");

navToggle.addEventListener("click", () => {
  document.body.classList.toggle("nav-open");
});

navLinks.forEach((link) => {
  link.addEventListener("click", () => {
    document.body.classList.remove("nav-open");
  });
});

if (slider) {
  // Horizontal Scroll Logic

  slider.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
    const rect = slider.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const width = rect.width;

    const scrollAmount = 650;

    const leftZone = width * 0.25;
    const rightZone = width * 0.75;

    if (x < leftZone) {
      slider.scrollBy({ left: -scrollAmount, behavior: "smooth" });
    } else if (x > rightZone) {
      slider.scrollBy({ left: scrollAmount, behavior: "smooth" });
    }
  });

  slider.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => {
    const rect = slider.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const width = rect.width;

    if (x < width * 0.25) {
      slider.style.cursor = "pointer"; // Left arrow
    } else if (x > width * 0.75) {
      slider.style.cursor = "pointer"; // Right arrow
    } else {
      slider.style.cursor = "default";
    }
  });
}

// Set current year in footer
const yearSpan = document.getElementById("copyright-year");
if (yearSpan) {
  yearSpan.textContent = new Date().getFullYear();
}

style.css:

*,
*::before,
*::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Custom properties */

:root {
  --ff-primary: "Rubik", sans-serif;
  --ff-secondary: "Oswald", sans-serif;

  --fw-reg: 300;
  --fw-bold: 900;

  --clr-light: #fefefe;
  --clr-dark: #0a0a0a;
  --clr-accent: #8b16e0;

  --fs-h1: 3rem;
  --fs-h2: 2.25rem;
  --fs-h3: 1.75rem;
  --fs-body: 1.2rem;

  --bs:
    0.25em 0.25em 0.75em rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25),
    0.125em 0.125em 0.25em rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
}

@media (min-width: 800px) {
  :root {
    --fs-h1: 4.5rem;
    --fs-h2: 3.75rem;
    --fs-h3: 2rem;
    --fs-body: 1.3rem;
  }
}

/* General styles */

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}
body {
  background: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--ff-primary);
  font-size: var(--fs-body);
}
img {
  display: block;
  max-width: 100%;
}
strong {
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
}

section {
  padding: 5em 1em;
}
:focus {
  outline: 3px solid var(--clr-accent);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

/* Buttons */

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.75em 2em;
  background: var(--clr-accent);
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  text-decoration: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  transition: transform 200ms ease-in-out;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
.btn:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

/* Typography */

h1,
h2,
h3 {
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 0;
}
h1 {
  font-size: var(--fs-h1);
}
h2 {
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
}
h3 {
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
}

.section__title {
  margin-bottom: 0.25em;
}
.section__title--intro {
  font-weight: var(--fw-reg);
}
.section__title--intro strong {
  display: block;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.section__subtitle {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
}
.section__subtitle--intro,
.section__subtitle--about {
  background: var(--clr-accent);
  font-family: var(--ff-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
  padding: 0.25em 1em;
}

/* header */

header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 1em;
}

.logo {
  max-width: 75px;
}

.nav {
  position: fixed;
  background: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  overflow-y: auto;

  transform: translateX(100%);
  transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1);
}
.nav__list {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: flex-end;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 5%;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  gap: 1em;
}
.nav__item {
  position: relative;
}
.nav__item:hover,
.nav__item:hover .nav__link,
.nav__item:hover .nav__link--index {
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background-color: var(--clr-light);
}
.nav__link {
  color: inherit;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 10px 35px;
}
.nav__link--index {
  font-size: 1.5em;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  position: absolute;
  right: 5px;
}
.nav-toggle {
  padding: 0.75em;
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: absolute;
  right: 1em;
  top: 1.75em;
  z-index: 1000;
}
.nav-toggle:focus {
  outline: none;
}
.nav-open .nav {
  transform: translateX(0);
}
.nav-open .nav-toggle {
  position: fixed;
}
.nav-open .hamburger {
  transform: rotate(0.625turn);
}
.nav-open .hamburger::before {
  transform: rotate(90deg) translateX(-10px);
}
.nav-open .hamburger::after {
  opacity: 0;
}

.hamburger {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
}
.hamburger,
.hamburger::before,
.hamburger::after {
  background: var(--clr-light);
  width: 2em;
  height: 3px;
  border-radius: 1em;

  transition: transform 250ms ease-in-out;
}
.hamburger::before,
.hamburger::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
}
.hamburger::before {
  top: 10px;
}
.hamburger::after {
  bottom: 10px;
}

/* Intro section */

.intro {
  position: relative;
}

.intro__img {
  box-shadow: var(--bs);
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .intro {
    display: grid;
    width: min-content;
    margin: 0 auto;
    grid-column-gap: 1em;
    grid-template-areas:
      "img title"
      "img subtitle";
    grid-template-columns: min-content max-content;
  }

  .intro__img {
    grid-area: img;
    min-width: 250px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .section__subtitle--intro {
    align-self: start;
    grid-column: -1 / 1;
    grid-row: 2;
    text-align: right;
    position: relative;
    left: -1.5em;
    width: calc(100% + 1.5em);
    padding-left: 275px;
  }
}

/* My services section */

.my-services {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  background-image: url(../imgs/services-bg.webp);
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: left top;
  background-blend-mode: color;
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
}
.section__title--services {
  color: var(--clr-accent);
  position: relative;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.section__title--services::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 3em;
  height: 1px;
  margin: 0.5em auto 1em;
  background: var(--clr-light);
  opacity: 0.25;
}
.services {
  margin-bottom: 3em;
}
.service {
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
@media (min-width: 800px) {
  .services {
    display: flex;
    max-width: 1300px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    gap: 2em;
  }
}

/* About Me */

.about-me {
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.about-me__img {
  box-shadow: var(--bs);
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .about-me {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 250px;
    grid-template-areas:
      "title img"
      "subtitle img"
      "text img";
    grid-column-gap: 2em;
  }
  .section__title--about {
    grid-area: title;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .section__subtitle--about {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
    grid-row: 2;
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 1em;
    padding-right: calc(250px + 4em);
  }
  .about-me__img {
    grid-area: img;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }
}

/* My Work */

.my-work {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 5em 0;
}
@media (max-width: 820px) {
  .my-work {
    padding: 5em 0 0 0;
  }
}
.section__title--work {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0 1em;
}
.section__subtitle--work {
  margin-bottom: 2em;
  padding: 0 1em;
}

.portfolio {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
}
.portfolio__item {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}
.portfolio__img {
  transition:
    transform 750ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1),
    opacity 250ms linear;
}
.portfolio__item:focus {
  outline: none;
}
.portfolio__item:hover .portfolio__img,
.portfolio__item:focus .portfolio__img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
  opacity: 0.1;
}
.portfolio__item:hover .portfolio__item__card,
.portfolio__item:focus .portfolio__item__card {
  opacity: 1;
}
.portfolio__item__card {
  color: var(--clr-light);
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: column wrap;
  height: 100%;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-content: flex-start;
  left: 0;
  opacity: 0;
  padding: 5%;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.3s;
  width: 100%;
}

.portfolio__item__card--top--title {
  font-family: var(--ff-secondary);
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  text-align: left;
  margin: 0 0 0.2em 0;
}
.portfolio__item__card--top--links {
  display: none;
  gap: 0.5em;
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 2;
}
.portfolio__item__card--top--links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background: var(--clr-light);
  padding: 10px 20px;
  border-radius: 100px;
}

.portfolio__item__card--bottom {
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: column wrap;
  align-content: flex-start;
  gap: 1rem;
  position: relative;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5em;
  z-index: 2;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--links a,
.project__header--link a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background: var(--clr-light);
  padding: 10px 20px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--list {
  display: none;
  flex-flow: row wrap;
  align-content: flex-start;
  gap: 6px;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--tags,
.project_header--list--tags {
  border: 1px solid var(--clr-light);
  border-radius: 100px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  font-size: 0.6em;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.portfolio__item--more {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}
.portfolio__item--more .portfolio__img {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
.portfolio__item--more:hover .portfolio__img,
.portfolio__item--more:focus .portfolio__img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
  opacity: 0.2;
}
.portfolio__item--more--txt {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 2;
  transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1);
}
.portfolio__item--more:hover .portfolio__item--more--txt {
  transform: scale(1.2);
}
.portfolio__item--more--txt {
  color: var(--clr-light);
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: row wrap;
  height: 100%;
  justify-content: center;
  align-content: center;
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  margin: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

@media (max-width: 375px) {
  .portfolio {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(245px, 1fr));
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--links a,
  .project__header--link a {
    font-size: 0.75em;
  }
  .section__subtitle {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: var(--fs-h4);
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--tags,
  .project_header--list--tags {
    font-size: 0.7em;
  }
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .portfolio {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(500px, 1fr));
    max-width: 1300px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--top--links a {
    font-size: 0.85em;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--list {
    display: flex;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--top--links {
    display: flex;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--links {
    display: none;
  }
}

/* My Skills */

.my-skills {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
}
.section__title--skills {
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.section__subtitle--skills {
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}
.skills__container {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1em;
}
.skills__img {
  width: 110px;
}

/* My Projects */

.my-projects {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 5em 0;
}
.section__title--projects {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0 1em;
}
.section__subtitle--projects {
  padding: 0 1em;
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}
.projects__container {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  overflow-x: auto;
  gap: 2em;
  padding: 0 1em 2em 1em;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
}
.projects__container::-webkit-scrollbar {
  display: none;
}
.projects__item--wrapper {
  width: 75vw;
  scroll-snap-align: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  height: auto;
  padding: 0.7em;
  background-color: #131313;
  border-radius: 25px;
}
.projects__item--img-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  height: 500px;
  border-radius: 25px;
  background-color: #0a0a0a;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.projects__item--img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top;
  transition: transform 750ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1);
}
.projects__item--img-wrapper:hover .projects__item--img,
.projects__item--img-wrapper:focus .projects__item--img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
}
.projects__item__info {
  padding: 0.5em;
}
.projects__item__info--title {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-align: left;
  margin: 0.25em 0 0.25em 0;
}
.projects__item__info--links {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5em;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}
.projects__item__info--links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background: var(--clr-light);
  padding: 8px 15px;
  border-radius: 100px;
}
.projects__item__info--list {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 0.35em;
}
.projects__item__info--list--tags {
  border: 1px solid var(--clr-light);
  border-radius: 100px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  font-size: 0.6em;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin: 0;
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .projects__item--wrapper {
    min-width: 600px;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .projects__item--img-wrapper {
    height: 250px;
  }
}
/* Footer */

.footer {
  background: #131313;
  color: var(--clr-accent);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2.5em 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
}
.footer a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.footer__link {
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  width: 95%;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.footer__link:hover,
.social-list__link:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
.footer__link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.social-list {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 2em 0 0;
  padding: 0;
}
.social-list__item {
  margin: 0 0.3em;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
}
.social-list__link {
  padding: 0.5em;
}
.social-list__link--contra img {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.social-list--mobile {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.social-list__item--txt {
  display: none;
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .social-list__item--mobile {
    display: none;
  }
  .social-list__item--txt {
    display: flex;
  }
}
@media (min-width: 2000px) {
  .footer__link {
    max-width: 50%;
  }
}
.footer__copyright {
  margin-top: 2em;
  font-size: 0.85em;
}

/* Individual portfolio items */

.project__header {
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: column nowrap;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 0 auto;
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 1200px;
}

.project_header--title {
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
.project__header--link {
  margin: 2em 0 5em 0;
}

.project_header--list {
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: row wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.5em;
}

.project_header--img {
  width: 85%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
  -webkit-box-shadow: 0px 0px 71px 1px rgba(140, 22, 224, 0.4);
  -moz-box-shadow: 0px 0px 71px 1px rgba(140, 22, 224, 0.4);
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 71px 1px rgba(140, 22, 224, 0.4);
  border-radius: 20px;
}
.project__img {
  transition:
    transform 750ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1),
    opacity 250ms linear;
}
.project_header--img:hover .project__img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
}

.project__body {
  max-width: 900px;
  padding: 2em;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  margin-bottom: 6em;
}

      <h3>Overview</h3>
      <p>
        ANOBS is a multidisciplinary consulting and business services firm built
        to help entrepreneurs and small businesses scale smarter.
      </p>
      <p>
        What started as a local service has grown into a full digital brand that
        merges creative design, financial systems, and business strategy into
        one seamless experience.
      </p>
      <p>
        As lead consultant, I revamped and re-designed the brand identity, built
        the digital infrastructure, and developed growth systems to help clients
        move from idea to execution — all under one roof.
      </p>
      <h3>Branding + Design</h3>
      <p>
        The ANOBS brand was built around clarity and confidence — professional,
        modern, and human. I developed a clean visual identity with a modular
        design system that could flex across business verticals, marketing
        materials, and service bundles.
      </p>
      <p>
        From pitch decks and capability statements to ad campaigns and client
        portals, every design choice reinforces the brand’s positioning:
        accessible sophistication built for growth.
      </p>
      <h3>Web Development</h3>
      <p>
        The ANOBS website was developed on WordPress using a custom theme and
        layout, supported by extensive custom CSS styling to create a modern,
        intuitive user experience.
      </p>
      <p>
        The site functions as both a service hub and a lead generation system,
        integrating contact funnels, service breakdowns, and conversion-focused
        design.
      </p>
      <p>
        It’s built to be fast, adaptable, and search-optimized — capable of
        supporting everything from consulting packages to resource libraries and
        client onboarding portals.
      </p>
      <h3>SEO + Marketing</h3>
      <p>
        I built ANOBS’s digital presence around organic growth — developing a
        full SEO strategy, content architecture, and data-driven marketing
        funnels.
      </p>
      <p>
        Every service page and article is optimized for discovery, connecting
        directly to client pain points while showcasing expertise. Complemented
        by targeted campaigns and automated email flows, the system turns
        visibility into consistent lead generation without relying on heavy ad
        spend.
      </p>
      <h3>Impact</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>
          Established a consistent client pipeline through organic SEO and
          strategic partnerships
        </li>
        <li>
          Built a full suite of service bundles covering consulting,
          bookkeeping, tax, and brand development
        </li>
        <li>
          Unified all service offerings under one cohesive brand and platform
        </li>
      </ul>

css:

*,
*::before,
*::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Custom properties */

:root {
  --ff-primary: "Rubik", sans-serif;
  --ff-secondary: "Oswald", sans-serif;

  --fw-reg: 300;
  --fw-bold: 900;

  --clr-light: #fefefe;
  --clr-dark: #0a0a0a;
  --clr-accent: #8b16e0;

  --fs-h1: 3rem;
  --fs-h2: 2.25rem;
  --fs-h3: 1.75rem;
  --fs-body: 1.2rem;

  --bs:
    0.25em 0.25em 0.75em rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25),
    0.125em 0.125em 0.25em rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
}

@media (min-width: 800px) {
  :root {
    --fs-h1: 4.5rem;
    --fs-h2: 3.75rem;
    --fs-h3: 2rem;
    --fs-body: 1.3rem;
  }
}

/* General styles */

html {
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
}
body {
  background: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  margin: 0;
  font-family: var(--ff-primary);
  font-size: var(--fs-body);
}
img {
  display: block;
  max-width: 100%;
}
strong {
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
}

section {
  padding: 5em 1em;
}
:focus {
  outline: 3px solid var(--clr-accent);
  outline-offset: 3px;
}

/* Buttons */

.btn {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 0.75em 2em;
  background: var(--clr-accent);
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  text-decoration: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  transition: transform 200ms ease-in-out;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
.btn:hover {
  transform: scale(1.1);
}

/* Typography */

h1,
h2,
h3 {
  line-height: 1;
  margin: 0;
}
h1 {
  font-size: var(--fs-h1);
}
h2 {
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
}
h3 {
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
}

.section__title {
  margin-bottom: 0.25em;
}
.section__title--intro {
  font-weight: var(--fw-reg);
}
.section__title--intro strong {
  display: block;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.section__subtitle {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
}
.section__subtitle--intro,
.section__subtitle--about {
  background: var(--clr-accent);
  font-family: var(--ff-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 0.5em;
  padding: 0.25em 1em;
}

/* header */

header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 1em;
}

.logo {
  max-width: 75px;
}

.nav {
  position: fixed;
  background: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  top: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  z-index: 100;
  overflow-y: auto;

  transform: translateX(100%);
  transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1);
}
.nav__list {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  height: 100%;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: flex-end;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 5%;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  gap: 1em;
}
.nav__item {
  position: relative;
}
.nav__item:hover,
.nav__item:hover .nav__link,
.nav__item:hover .nav__link--index {
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background-color: var(--clr-light);
}
.nav__link {
  color: inherit;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: 10px 35px;
}
.nav__link--index {
  font-size: 1.5em;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  position: absolute;
  right: 5px;
}
.nav-toggle {
  padding: 0.75em;
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  position: absolute;
  right: 1em;
  top: 1.75em;
  z-index: 1000;
}
.nav-toggle:focus {
  outline: none;
}
.nav-open .nav {
  transform: translateX(0);
}
.nav-open .nav-toggle {
  position: fixed;
}
.nav-open .hamburger {
  transform: rotate(0.625turn);
}
.nav-open .hamburger::before {
  transform: rotate(90deg) translateX(-10px);
}
.nav-open .hamburger::after {
  opacity: 0;
}

.hamburger {
  display: block;
  position: relative;
}
.hamburger,
.hamburger::before,
.hamburger::after {
  background: var(--clr-light);
  width: 2em;
  height: 3px;
  border-radius: 1em;

  transition: transform 250ms ease-in-out;
}
.hamburger::before,
.hamburger::after {
  content: "";
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
}
.hamburger::before {
  top: 10px;
}
.hamburger::after {
  bottom: 10px;
}

/* Intro section */

.intro {
  position: relative;
}

.intro__img {
  box-shadow: var(--bs);
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .intro {
    display: grid;
    width: min-content;
    margin: 0 auto;
    grid-column-gap: 1em;
    grid-template-areas:
      "img title"
      "img subtitle";
    grid-template-columns: min-content max-content;
  }

  .intro__img {
    grid-area: img;
    min-width: 250px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }

  .section__subtitle--intro {
    align-self: start;
    grid-column: -1 / 1;
    grid-row: 2;
    text-align: right;
    position: relative;
    left: -1.5em;
    width: calc(100% + 1.5em);
    padding-left: 275px;
  }
}

/* My services section */

.my-services {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  background-image: url(../imgs/services-bg.webp);
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: left top;
  background-blend-mode: color;
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
}
.section__title--services {
  color: var(--clr-accent);
  position: relative;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.section__title--services::after {
  content: "";
  display: block;
  width: 3em;
  height: 1px;
  margin: 0.5em auto 1em;
  background: var(--clr-light);
  opacity: 0.25;
}
.services {
  margin-bottom: 3em;
}
.service {
  max-width: 600px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
@media (min-width: 800px) {
  .services {
    display: flex;
    max-width: 1300px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
    gap: 2em;
  }
}

/* About Me */

.about-me {
  max-width: 1000px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.about-me__img {
  box-shadow: var(--bs);
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .about-me {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 250px;
    grid-template-areas:
      "title img"
      "subtitle img"
      "text img";
    grid-column-gap: 2em;
  }
  .section__title--about {
    grid-area: title;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .section__subtitle--about {
    grid-column: 1 / -1;
    grid-row: 2;
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 1em;
    padding-right: calc(250px + 4em);
  }
  .about-me__img {
    grid-area: img;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
  }
}

/* My Work */

.my-work {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 5em 0;
}
@media (max-width: 820px) {
  .my-work {
    padding: 5em 0 0 0;
  }
}
.section__title--work {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0 1em;
}
.section__subtitle--work {
  margin-bottom: 2em;
  padding: 0 1em;
}

.portfolio {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
}
.portfolio__item {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}
.portfolio__img {
  transition:
    transform 750ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1),
    opacity 250ms linear;
}
.portfolio__item:focus {
  outline: none;
}
.portfolio__item:hover .portfolio__img,
.portfolio__item:focus .portfolio__img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
  opacity: 0.1;
}
.portfolio__item:hover .portfolio__item__card,
.portfolio__item:focus .portfolio__item__card {
  opacity: 1;
}
.portfolio__item__card {
  color: var(--clr-light);
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: column wrap;
  height: 100%;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-content: flex-start;
  left: 0;
  opacity: 0;
  padding: 5%;
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  transition: opacity 0.3s;
  width: 100%;
}

.portfolio__item__card--top--title {
  font-family: var(--ff-secondary);
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  text-align: left;
  margin: 0 0 0.2em 0;
}
.portfolio__item__card--top--links {
  display: none;
  gap: 0.5em;
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 2;
}
.portfolio__item__card--top--links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background: var(--clr-light);
  padding: 10px 20px;
  border-radius: 100px;
}

.portfolio__item__card--bottom {
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: column wrap;
  align-content: flex-start;
  gap: 1rem;
  position: relative;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--links {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5em;
  z-index: 2;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--links a,
.project__header--link a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background: var(--clr-light);
  padding: 10px 20px;
  border-radius: 100px;
  font-size: 0.85em;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--list {
  display: none;
  flex-flow: row wrap;
  align-content: flex-start;
  gap: 6px;
}
.portfolio__item__card--bottom--tags,
.project_header--list--tags {
  border: 1px solid var(--clr-light);
  border-radius: 100px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  font-size: 0.6em;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0;
}

.portfolio__item--more {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
}
.portfolio__item--more .portfolio__img {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
.portfolio__item--more:hover .portfolio__img,
.portfolio__item--more:focus .portfolio__img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
  opacity: 0.2;
}
.portfolio__item--more--txt {
  position: absolute;
  z-index: 2;
  transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1);
}
.portfolio__item--more:hover .portfolio__item--more--txt {
  transform: scale(1.2);
}
.portfolio__item--more--txt {
  color: var(--clr-light);
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: row wrap;
  height: 100%;
  justify-content: center;
  align-content: center;
  position: absolute;
  width: 100%;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  margin: 0;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

@media (max-width: 375px) {
  .portfolio {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(245px, 1fr));
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--links a,
  .project__header--link a {
    font-size: 0.75em;
  }
  .section__subtitle {
    margin: 0;
    font-size: var(--fs-h4);
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--tags,
  .project_header--list--tags {
    font-size: 0.7em;
  }
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .portfolio {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(500px, 1fr));
    max-width: 1300px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--top--links a {
    font-size: 0.85em;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--list {
    display: flex;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--top--links {
    display: flex;
  }
  .portfolio__item__card--bottom--links {
    display: none;
  }
}

/* My Skills */

.my-skills {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
}
.section__title--skills {
  text-transform: uppercase;
}
.section__subtitle--skills {
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}
.skills__container {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 1em;
}
.skills__img {
  width: 110px;
}

/* My Projects */

.my-projects {
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  color: var(--clr-light);
  text-align: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  padding: 5em 0;
}
.section__title--projects {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  padding: 0 1em;
}
.section__subtitle--projects {
  padding: 0 1em;
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}
.projects__container {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: nowrap;
  overflow-x: auto;
  gap: 2em;
  padding: 0 1em 2em 1em;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  scroll-snap-type: x mandatory;
  justify-content: flex-start;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
}
.projects__container::-webkit-scrollbar {
  display: none;
}
.projects__item--wrapper {
  width: 75vw;
  scroll-snap-align: center;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  height: auto;
  padding: 0.7em;
  background-color: #131313;
  border-radius: 25px;
}
.projects__item--img-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  height: 500px;
  border-radius: 25px;
  background-color: #0a0a0a;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.projects__item--img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top;
  transition: transform 750ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1);
}
.projects__item--img-wrapper:hover .projects__item--img,
.projects__item--img-wrapper:focus .projects__item--img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
}
.projects__item__info {
  padding: 0.5em;
}
.projects__item__info--title {
  text-transform: uppercase;
  text-align: left;
  margin: 0.25em 0 0.25em 0;
}
.projects__item__info--links {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.5em;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}
.projects__item__info--links a {
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--clr-dark);
  background: var(--clr-light);
  padding: 8px 15px;
  border-radius: 100px;
}
.projects__item__info--list {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  flex-direction: row;
  gap: 0.35em;
}
.projects__item__info--list--tags {
  border: 1px solid var(--clr-light);
  border-radius: 100px;
  padding: 8px 12px;
  font-size: 0.6em;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin: 0;
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .projects__item--wrapper {
    min-width: 600px;
  }
}
@media (max-width: 600px) {
  .projects__item--img-wrapper {
    height: 250px;
  }
}
/* Footer */

.footer {
  background: #131313;
  color: var(--clr-accent);
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2.5em 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
}
.footer a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.footer__link {
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  width: 95%;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
.footer__link:hover,
.social-list__link:hover {
  opacity: 0.7;
}
.footer__link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.social-list {
  list-style: none;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 2em 0 0;
  padding: 0;
}
.social-list__item {
  margin: 0 0.3em;
  font-size: var(--fs-h3);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
}
.social-list__link {
  padding: 0.5em;
}
.social-list__link--contra img {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 2px;
}
.social-list--mobile {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}
.social-list__item--txt {
  display: none;
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .social-list__item--mobile {
    display: none;
  }
  .social-list__item--txt {
    display: flex;
  }
}
@media (min-width: 2000px) {
  .footer__link {
    max-width: 50%;
  }
}
.footer__copyright {
  margin-top: 2em;
  font-size: 0.85em;
}

/* Individual portfolio items */

.project__header {
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: column nowrap;
  justify-content: center;
  margin: 0 auto;
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 1200px;
}

.project_header--title {
  font-size: var(--fs-h2);
  font-weight: var(--fw-bold);
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}
.project__header--link {
  margin: 2em 0 5em 0;
}

.project_header--list {
  display: flex;
  flex-flow: row wrap;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 0.5em;
}

.project_header--img {
  width: 85%;
  margin: 0 auto;
  background-color: var(--clr-dark);
  overflow: hidden;
  position: relative;
  -webkit-box-shadow: 0px 0px 71px 1px rgba(140, 22, 224, 0.4);
  -moz-box-shadow: 0px 0px 71px 1px rgba(140, 22, 224, 0.4);
  box-shadow: 0px 0px 71px 1px rgba(140, 22, 224, 0.4);
  border-radius: 20px;
}
.project__img {
  transition:
    transform 750ms cubic-bezier(0.5, 0, 0.5, 1),
    opacity 250ms linear;
}
.project_header--img:hover .project__img {
  transform: scale(1.2);
}

.project__body {
  max-width: 900px;
  padding: 2em;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
  margin-bottom: 6em;
}
